bullets.text: Q1 CR healthy across all lines: Agency auto CR 90.5, Direct auto CR 93.1, Personal Lines CR 91.8; Commercial Lines CR 89.6; Property CR 96.6 including ~7 pts amortization (underlying ~90 before amortization); NPW grew 12% YOY.

Personal Lines net written and earned premium each grew 13%; Property net written premium grew 27%; Commercial Lines net written premium flat (underwriting restrictions lifting) but net earned premium up 18% as prior rate increases earned in.

Property PIFs up 17% YOY; Robinson (auto+home bundle) new business applications up 50%+ YOY; PIF growth in Robinson cohort exceeded 25%; Direct auto new applications positive in March as tax refund backlog cleared and media spend ramped.

Q1 investment return 1.7% (equity +6.1%, fixed income +1.1%); issued $850M 30-year senior notes at 4.125% in early April to pre-fund $564M 6.70% debenture redemption; debt-to-total capital temporarily above 30% ceiling but returning below upon redemption.

HomeQuote Explorer launched in 8-state pilot in March; Robinson new business apps up 50%+ using HQX; Snapshot mobile app introduced to additional states (targeting full countrywide rollout by year-end); 6.2M miles and 500K+ trips collected via mobile app.

Commercial Lines underwriting restrictions lifted at end of Q1 as enhanced segmentation gains confidence; several Commercial restrictions lifted in March showing early improvement in new business applications; ~9 pts additional commercial rate still to earn in.

Snapshot mobile app: >50% of eligible Direct Snapshot customers choosing mobile option where available; photo estimating approaching full countrywide rollout via Progressive mobile app; aggregate stop-loss reinsurance for Property designed and placed for 2017.

Commercial Lines CR 89.6 in Q1; underwriting restrictions from Q3 2016 being lifted; new segmentation improving quote quality; exiting Australia after 7 years due to inability to reach profitability targets — focusing on U.S. Destination Era agenda.

Momentum and excitement within Progressive following strong 2016; Agency channel gained momentum with Platinum program; Gainshare score 1.67 for 2016 (highest since 2004); hiring 6,000+ people planned for 2017 to support continued growth.

Agency new auto applications up 15% in Q1; Agency CR 90.5 vs. Direct CR 93.1 showing channel health; Progressive Advantage Agency growing Robinson capabilities; Platinum agency program driving Robinson PIF growth in +50% range.
